findings.title: Unused createSpecDocumentChain import (dead import)
findings.evidence: Imported from ../storage/causal-edges.js but never called; execute path uses predictSpecChainEdges+insertEdgesBatch (514-524) to set created_by='auto', which createSpecDocumentChain cannot. Only non-comment occurrence is the import binding.
findings.recommendation: Drop createSpecDocumentChain from the import list; keep the explanatory comments.

findings.title: Dead no-op accounting loop with misleading comment
findings.evidence: for(edge of edges) bumpRelation(edge.relation,0) adds zero; comment claims proportional attribution that does not exist. Real per-relation tally is recomputed by countWrittenByRelation (584-591,660-692), which overwrites byRelation after commit.
findings.recommendation: Delete the loop or rewrite the comment to 'key-seed only; real tally via countWrittenByRelation'.

findings.title: Spec-chain strengths use bare 0.4 literal instead of a named constant
findings.evidence: Sibling collectors expose LINEAGE_CAUSED_STRENGTH/SIMILARITY_SUPPORTS_STRENGTH/SUPERSESSION_CONTRADICTS_STRENGTH (39/44/48); predictSpecChainEdges hardcodes 0.4 x6 unlinked. Value equals LINEAGE_CAUSED_STRENGTH but not referenced -> silent-drift risk. Strengths are all <0.5 and correct, so clarity-only.
findings.recommendation: Introduce SPEC_CHAIN_CAUSED_STRENGTH/SPEC_CHAIN_SUPPORTS_STRENGTH (or reuse LINEAGE_CAUSED_STRENGTH) and clarify the lock-step comment.

findings.title: Four near-identical collector write blocks (duplication / extension friction)
findings.evidence: Spec-chain/lineage/similarity/supersession write branches repeat .map(edge=>({...createdBy:'auto'}))->insertEdgesBatch->total+=result.inserted; three are byte-identical except the source array. Adding a 5th collector requires copy-pasting the block.
findings.recommendation: Extract insertInferredEdges(edges):number helper; call once per collector array.

findings.title: Non-dry-run byRelation count accuracy is untested
findings.evidence: Tests assert byRelation only on dry runs (toBeGreaterThan 0) or assert edge rows directly on non-dry runs; no assertion of committed-run byRelation numeric values from countWrittenByRelation (660-692). Mis-attribution regression would pass green.
findings.recommendation: After a committed run assert result.byRelation.caused/.supports/.contradicts equal SELECT relation,COUNT(*) FROM causal_edges WHERE created_by='auto'.
